title.en: Annex D: The Bibliography, and How an Amendment Patches It
title.zh: 附录 D：参考文献，以及修正案如何为其打补丁

blocks.en: Every IEEE 802 standard ends with an informative Annex called the Bibliography. "Informative" means it is for guidance only — nothing in it is mandatory, unlike the "normative" body of the standard that defines what a conformant implementation must do. The Bibliography simply lists the supporting documents the standard refers to for background. In IEEE Std 802.1ABdh-2021 — the LLDP Multi-Frame Amendment — this is Annex D. LLDP stands for Link Layer Discovery Protocol, the IEEE 802.1AB mechanism by which a network device advertises its identity and capabilities to its immediate neighbors.
blocks.zh: 每一份 IEEE 802 标准的结尾都有一个名为“参考文献”（Bibliography）的资料性附录。“资料性”（informative）意味着它仅供参考——其中的内容都不是强制性的，这与标准正文中规定符合性实现必须做什么的“规范性”（normative）部分不同。参考文献只是列出标准为提供背景而引用的支撑文档。在 IEEE Std 802.1ABdh-2021——即 LLDP 多帧修正案——中，这就是附录 D。LLDP 是链路层发现协议（Link Layer Discovery Protocol）的缩写，它是 IEEE 802.1AB 中网络设备向其直接邻居通告自身身份与能力的机制。

blocks.en: Key distinction: a standard's body is normative (you must comply to conform). Annexes can be either normative or informative. Annex D is explicitly marked "(informative)," so it adds reading material, not requirements. You can implement the standard correctly without ever opening a single bibliography reference.
blocks.zh: 关键区别：标准的正文是规范性的（要符合标准就必须遵守）。附录可以是规范性的，也可以是资料性的。附录 D 明确标注为“（资料性）”，因此它提供的是阅读材料，而非要求。你完全可以在不翻阅任何一条参考文献的情况下正确实现该标准。

blocks.en: Here is the subtle part that confuses first-time readers of amendments. An amendment like 802.1ABdh-2021 is not a stand-alone book — it is a set of editing instructions applied on top of the base standard, IEEE Std 802.1AB. So Annex D in the amendment does not reprint the whole bibliography. Instead it contains a single editing instruction telling you exactly where to splice one new reference into the base standard's existing Annex D list.
blocks.zh: 这里有一个让初次阅读修正案的人感到困惑的微妙之处。像 802.1ABdh-2021 这样的修正案并不是一本独立的书——它是一组叠加在基础标准 IEEE Std 802.1AB 之上的编辑指令。因此修正案中的附录 D 并不会重印整个参考文献列表，而是只包含一条编辑指令，明确告诉你应把哪一条新参考文献准确地插入到基础标准已有的附录 D 列表中的什么位置。

blocks.en: The exact instruction on the page reads: "Insert the following bibliography entry in Annex D after [B14] as inserted by IEEE Std 802.1ABcu-2021." The bracketed labels like [B14] and [B15] are the citation tags used throughout the standard. Notice the chaining: 802.1ABcu-2021 (an earlier amendment) had already added [B14], and now 802.1ABdh-2021 adds the next entry right after it. Amendments stack on one another in order.
blocks.zh: 页面上的确切指令是：“在附录 D 中、紧跟由 IEEE Std 802.1ABcu-2021 插入的 [B14] 之后，插入以下参考文献条目。”像 [B14]、[B15] 这样的方括号标签是整份标准中使用的引用编号。注意这种链式关系：802.1ABcu-2021（一份更早的修正案）已经添加了 [B14]，而现在 802.1ABdh-2021 在其后紧接着添加下一条。各修正案是按顺序层层叠加的。

blocks.en: The single new reference being added is ISO/IEC 8802-2 (the bracketed tag becomes [B15] once spliced in): "Standard for Information technology — Telecommunications and information exchange between systems — Local and metropolitan area networks — Specific requirements — Part 2: Logical link control." Logical Link Control (LLC) is the upper sublayer of the data link layer that sits above the Medium Access Control (MAC) sublayer and gives the network layer a uniform interface regardless of the underlying medium. The page also notes that ISO/IEC publications are available from ISO, the IEC, and ANSI (the American National Standards Institute).
blocks.zh: 被添加的唯一一条新参考文献是 ISO/IEC 8802-2（插入后其标签成为 [B15]）：“信息技术标准——系统间的电信与信息交换——局域网与城域网——特定要求——第 2 部分：逻辑链路控制。”逻辑链路控制（Logical Link Control，LLC）是数据链路层中位于介质访问控制（Medium Access Control，MAC）子层之上的上层子层，它无论底层介质如何，都向网络层提供统一的接口。该页还说明，ISO/IEC 出版物可从 ISO、IEC 以及 ANSI（美国国家标准学会）获取。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Base 802.1AB Annex D] --> B[802.1ABcu-2021 inserts B14]
  B --> C[802.1ABdh-2021 inserts B15 after B14]
  C --> D[B15 = ISO/IEC 8802-2 Logical Link Control]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[基础 802.1AB 附录 D] --> B[802.1ABcu-2021 插入 B14]
  B --> C[802.1ABdh-2021 在 B14 之后插入 B15]
  C --> D[B15 = ISO/IEC 8802-2 逻辑链路控制]

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 420 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="20" width="400" height="30"/><text x="20" y="40" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">[B13] ...</text><rect x="10" y="55" width="400" height="30"/><text x="20" y="75" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">[B14] (added by 802.1ABcu-2021)</text><rect x="10" y="90" width="400" height="30" stroke-dasharray="5 3"/><text x="20" y="110" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">[B15] ISO/IEC 8802-2 LLC (added by 802.1ABdh)</text><text x="10" y="140" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Annex D bibliography list (insertion point shown dashed)</text></svg>

caption.en: Annex D as an ordered list of bracketed references. The amendment's only action here is to splice [B15] in right after [B14].
caption.zh: 附录 D 是一个由方括号引用构成的有序列表。修正案在此唯一的动作就是把 [B15] 紧接着插入到 [B14] 之后。

blocks.en: Why does an LLDP multi-frame amendment cite a Logical Link Control document at all? LLDP frames travel over the data link layer, and the multi-frame extension (which lets a single LLDP advertisement span several Protocol Data Units, or PDUs, when it is too large for one frame) reaches back to the foundational LLC definitions for framing and addressing context. The reference is purely background — it helps a reader understand the lower-layer plumbing, but it imposes no new conformance obligation.
blocks.zh: 为什么一份 LLDP 多帧修正案会引用一份逻辑链路控制的文档呢？LLDP 帧在数据链路层上传输，而多帧扩展（当一条 LLDP 通告过大、无法装入单帧时，它允许该通告跨越多个协议数据单元，即 PDU）需要回溯到 LLC 的基础定义，以获得帧结构与寻址方面的背景。这条引用纯粹是背景性的——它帮助读者理解底层的“管路”，但并不施加任何新的符合性义务。

blocks.en: Reading tip for any 802 amendment: when an annex says "Insert ... after [Bnn]," mentally apply that edit to the base standard. The amendment document is a diff; the readable result only exists once you merge it back into 802.1AB.
blocks.zh: 阅读任意一份 802 修正案的小技巧：当某个附录写着“在 [Bnn] 之后插入……”时，请在脑中把该编辑应用到基础标准上。修正案文档是一份差异（diff）；只有把它合并回 802.1AB，才能得到可读的最终结果。

summary.en: Coverage map — every part of Annex D (informative) Bibliography
summary.zh: 覆盖图谱——资料性附录 D 参考文献的每一部分

blocks.en: Annex D (informative) Bibliography is the single unit this lesson covers, and it lives entirely on one page of 802.1ABdh-2021. Its contents: (1) the annex header marking it "(informative)" — guidance, not requirement; (2) one editing instruction — "Insert the following bibliography entry in Annex D after [B14] as inserted by IEEE Std 802.1ABcu-2021" — locating the splice point relative to a prior amendment's edit; (3) the new reference itself: ISO/IEC 8802-2, "Standard for Information technology — Telecommunications and information exchange between systems — Local and metropolitan area networks — Specific requirements — Part 2: Logical link control," which becomes bibliography tag [B15] in the merged base standard; and (4) a sourcing footnote stating that ISO/IEC publications are available from ISO, the IEC, and ANSI. That is the complete substance of Annex D in this amendment — no normative clauses, no state machines, just one bibliography insertion.
blocks.zh: 资料性附录 D 参考文献是本课覆盖的唯一单元，它完整地位于 802.1ABdh-2021 的一页之上。其内容包括：(1) 标注为“（资料性）”的附录标题——是指导而非要求；(2) 一条编辑指令——“在附录 D 中、紧跟由 IEEE Std 802.1ABcu-2021 插入的 [B14] 之后，插入以下参考文献条目”——它相对于先前修正案的编辑确定了插入点；(3) 新参考文献本身：ISO/IEC 8802-2，“信息技术标准——系统间的电信与信息交换——局域网与城域网——特定要求——第 2 部分：逻辑链路控制”，它在合并后的基础标准中成为参考文献编号 [B15]；以及 (4) 一条来源脚注，说明 ISO/IEC 出版物可从 ISO、IEC 与 ANSI 获取。这就是本修正案中附录 D 的全部内容——没有规范性条款，没有状态机，只有一条参考文献插入。

cites.note: Annex D (informative) Bibliography — single editing instruction inserting ISO/IEC 8802-2 (Logical link control) after [B14] from 802.1ABcu-2021.
